overview.name: Crowned Trader
overview.description: A full-stack trading signal management and distribution platform. Enables traders to generate, track, and distribute trading signals across multiple asset classes via Discord webhooks, with automated trade tracking through TradeSync integration.

architecture.frontend: React 18 + Vite + TanStack Query + wouter routing
architecture.sharedLayer: Shared TypeScript types, Zod validators, and template rendering logic used by both client and server

features.name: Authentication & Authorization
features.description: Login-only authentication (no public registration) with role-based access control. Admin users access all pages; regular users see only trading-related pages.
howItWorks: Users authenticate via POST /api/auth/login with username and password
Passwords are hashed with bcryptjs (10 salt rounds) before storage
Sessions are stored in PostgreSQL via connect-pg-simple middleware
requireAuth middleware checks for valid session on all protected routes
requireAdmin middleware additionally verifies user.role === 'admin'
Frontend useAuth hook fetches GET /api/auth/me to determine auth state
Sidebar navigation conditionally shows admin-only items based on role

files.role: Custom session auth, bcryptjs password hashing (10 rounds), requireAuth/requireAdmin middleware
useAuth() hook, useLogin() and useLogout() mutations

features.latestUpdates: Stable - custom session-based auth with bcryptjs and express-session

features.name: Signal Submission Engine
features.description: Unified form for creating and sending trading signals across all asset classes. Supports options, shares, LETF, LETF options, and crypto with instrument-specific fields, auto-pricing, and live Discord preview.
howItWorks: User searches for a ticker via Polygon.io API autocomplete
System auto-detects instrument category (Stock, ETF, LETF, Crypto) from Polygon metadata
Stock price is auto-fetched; for LETFs, underlying ticker price is also fetched via LETF_UNDERLYING_MAP
If 'Is Option' is enabled, best option contract is auto-selected based on trade type (Scalp/Swing/Leap)
User configures trade plan: saved preset or live custom with TP levels, stop loss, trailing stops
Live Discord embed preview renders in real-time as the form is filled
On submit: signal saved to DB, sent to Discord via webhook, pushed to TradeSync API
Optional chart analysis image can be attached via multipart upload

files.role: Unified Send Signal form with all instrument modes and live preview
POST /api/signals handler: validation, DB save, Discord send, TradeSync push
buildEmbed() and sendToDiscord() for webhook delivery
buildTradeSyncPayload() and sendToTradeSync() for trade tracking

features.latestUpdates: Unified Send Signal form with crypto detection, LETF underlying map, live Discord preview, TradeSync integration

features.name: Discord Integration
features.description: Sends trading signals as rich embedded messages to Discord channels via webhooks. 30 pre-defined templates across 5 instrument categories and 6 action types.
howItWorks: Each user has Discord channels stored as JSONB on their user record ({name, webhookUrl} pairs)
When a signal is sent, buildEmbed() loads the matching template and renders it with signal data
Template rendering uses Handlebars-style {{variable}} interpolation for title, description, and fields
Category-specific color coding is applied to the embed sidebar
Footer includes standard disclaimer text
The content field (e.g., '@everyone') is sent alongside the embed
File attachments (chart images) are sent as multipart form data
TLS verification is disabled for webhook compatibility

files.role: Core webhook client: embed builder, sender, multipart support
{{variable}} rendering logic shared by client and server
Seeds templates from definitions on first run

features.latestUpdates: Stable - Discord webhook sender with TLS override and multipart support

features.name: TradeSync Integration
features.description: Pushes trade signals to an external TradeSync dashboard for automated position tracking and portfolio management.
howItWorks: buildTradeSyncPayload() maps signal data to TradeSync format: ticker, instrument type, direction, entry price
Calculates stop loss price (percentage-based or underlying price-based)
Builds targets object with TP prices, take-off percentages, and raise-SL rules
Sets time stop based on trade type: Scalp (2 days), Swing (5 days), Leap (10 days)
Includes Discord webhook URL for TradeSync's own notifications
Payload POSTed to TradeSync API with Bearer token authentication
Auto-track flag controls whether TradeSync monitors the position automatically

files.role: TradeSyncSignal interface, payload builder, API client

features.latestUpdates: Stable - TradeSync API integration for auto-tracking trade signals

features.name: Position Management
features.description: Tracks all trading positions from entry through exit, supporting partial exits (TP hits), full exits (with reason classification), and manual tracking mode.
howItWorks: Positions are signals with status: 'open' or 'closed'
Position Management page shows three tabs: Open, Closed, All
Each position displays: ticker, contract details, entry price, mark price, P/L %, realized P/L %, tracking mode
Partial Exit: triggered at TP levels, sends TP hit Discord embed, updates signal data
Full Exit: offers three reason types (Take Profit, Stop Loss, Trailing Stop)
User enters current price, system calculates P/L, sends closing embed to Discord
Switch to Manual: converts auto-tracked signals to manual tracking mode
Position data updates use PATCH /api/signals/:id/data to merge fields into JSONB

files.role: Position table with tabs, Partial/Full Exit modals, Switch to Manual

features.latestUpdates: Rebuilt with tab navigation, Partial Exit modal with TP detection, Full Exit with reason classification, Switch to Manual

features.name: Trade Plans
features.description: Customizable presets for take-profit/stop-loss strategies that can be saved, loaded, and applied when sending signals.
howItWorks: Each trade plan defines: target type, stop loss percentage, and take profit levels array
TP levels configure: level %, take off %, raise stop loss to, and trailing stop per level
Plans are user-scoped (admin can see all plans)
One plan can be marked as default (auto-selected in Send Signal form)
Send Signal form offers 'Saved Plan' or 'Live Custom' modes
Live Custom mode exposes the full trade plan editor inline
Plans include a live Discord embed preview showing how targets will appear

files.role: Trade plan CRUD UI with create/edit modal and live preview
Shared TP level form (used by trade plans and send signal)

features.latestUpdates: Stable - trade plan CRUD with TP levels, stop loss, trailing stop configuration

features.name: Ticker Intelligence
features.description: Real-time ticker search, price fetching, instrument classification, and automated best option contract selection via the Polygon.io API.
howItWorks: Ticker Search: /api/ticker-search searches Polygon with optional market filter (stocks, crypto)
Crypto tickers have 'X:' prefix stripped for display but re-added for API calls
Ticker Details: /api/ticker-details/:ticker classifies as Stock, ETF, LETF, or Crypto
For LETFs, maps to underlying using LETF_UNDERLYING_MAP (e.g., TQQQ -> QQQ, SOXL -> SOXX)
Stock Price: /api/stock-price/:ticker fetches latest via Polygon previous close endpoint
Best Option: /api/best-option auto-selects optimal contract using progressive fallback filters
Option selection considers: delta, DTE, open interest, bid-ask spread based on trade type

files.role: All Polygon API proxy endpoints (ticker-search, ticker-details, stock-price, best-option, option-quote)
Ticker search input, auto-price fetching, best option selection UI

features.latestUpdates: Stable - Polygon.io integration with LETF underlying mapping

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: Ranks traders by performance metrics over configurable time periods with aggregate statistics.
howItWorks: GET /api/leaderboard?period=... aggregates signal data by user
Supported periods: this_week, last_week, this_month, last_month
For each trader: counts trades, wins, losses, calculates average P/L and win rate
Win determination based on realized P/L from closed positions
Dashboard displays leaderboard with rank indicators and crown icon for top trader
Stats grid shows aggregate totals: Trades, Wins, Losses, Avg P/L, Win Rate

files.role: Leaderboard component with period tabs and stats grid

features.latestUpdates: Added Crowned Traders Leaderboard with period filtering (This Week, Last Week, This Month, Last Month)

features.name: Signal History
features.description: Searchable, browsable audit log of all trading signals sent through the system with expandable payloads and Discord previews.
howItWorks: Displays signals grouped by date in a card-based layout
Each card shows: ticker, instrument type, trade type, Discord delivery status, timestamp
Summary stats at top: Total Sent, Success (delivered to Discord), Failed
Expandable raw payload section shows the full JSONB data
Copy button copies payload to clipboard; Discord preview shows embed as it appeared
Search filters signals by ticker name
Cards arranged in 2-column grid on desktop, single column on mobile

files.role: Card-based signal browser with date grouping and search

features.latestUpdates: Redesigned as card-based layout grouped by date with summary stats, expandable payload, copy and Discord preview

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin interface for creating, editing, and deleting user accounts with role assignment and Discord channel configuration.
howItWorks: User List (/users): table showing all users with role badges, channel counts, edit/delete actions
Create User (/users/create): full-page form with username, password, role, and channel editor
Edit User (/users/:id/edit): edit role, change password, manage Discord channels
Channel Editor: inline component for adding/removing channel entries (name + webhook URL)
Channels stored as JSONB array on user record (no separate table)
Admin cannot delete themselves; delete requires AlertDialog confirmation

files.role: Three-view page: list, create, edit with channel editor

features.latestUpdates: Stable - admin user CRUD with channel management

features.name: Discord Templates Page
features.description: Admin page for browsing, previewing, and manually sending the 30 pre-defined Discord message templates organized by category.
howItWorks: Templates organized by category tabs (Options, Shares, LETF, LETF Option, Crypto)
Each template displayed as a card with name, slug, variable list, and field preview
Preview Dialog: renders full Discord embed preview with sample data
Send Manual Dialog: form with channel selector and variable inputs, live preview on right side
Sends to selected Discord webhook on submit
Category count badges show template counts per category

files.role: Category-tabbed template browser with preview and send dialogs

features.latestUpdates: Stable - admin template editor with preview and manual send

features.name: Send Technical Analysis
features.description: Post technical analysis commentary with media (images or videos) to Discord channels with live preview.
howItWorks: User selects a destination Discord channel from their configured channels
Enters analysis commentary text
Uploads an image or video file via drag & drop or file picker
Live Discord preview shows the embed with attached media
On submit, sends as multipart form to POST /api/send-ta
Server constructs Discord embed with commentary and attached media file

files.role: TA form with channel selector, commentary, media upload, and live preview

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview page showing aggregate signal statistics and the Crowned Traders leaderboard.
howItWorks: Three stats cards: Total Signals, Signal Types, Sent to Discord
Full leaderboard component with period filtering embedded below stats
Stats fetched from GET /api/stats
Leaderboard fetched from GET /api/leaderboard

files.role: Stats cards and embedded Leaderboard component

features.latestUpdates: Removed Recent Signals section; added Crowned Traders Leaderboard with period filtering

features.name: System Audit
features.description: Comprehensive reference page documenting the entire system's architecture, features, codebase structure, and latest updates.
howItWorks: Displays system overview with architecture description and tech stack
Browsable feature reference with detailed explanations and file mappings
Codebase file listing with line counts and last modified timestamps
Latest update log with change explanations per file
Data served from GET /api/audit which combines SYSTEM_AUDIT.json with dynamic file stats

files.role: Tabbed UI: Overview, Features, Codebase, Latest Updates

features.latestUpdates: Transformed from file listing to comprehensive architecture reference with features, data flows, and cross-references

dataFlows.name: Signal Submission Flow
steps: Configure trade plan (saved or live custom)
Live Discord preview renders in real-time

dataFlows.name: Position Lifecycle
steps: Position Management tracks it in Open tab
Discord embed sent for TP hit
Signal data updated with TP details
Reason selected: TP / SL / Trailing Stop

dataFlows.name: Authentication Flow
steps: 200 response: show authenticated app with sidebar

latestChanges.title: System Audit Enhancement
latestChanges.description: Transformed from simple file listing to comprehensive architecture reference with features, data flows, and cross-reference maps. Added browsable tabbed UI.

latestChanges.title: Position Management Overhaul
latestChanges.description: Rebuilt with tab navigation (Open/Closed/All), Partial Exit modal with Discord preview and TP level detection, Full Exit modal with reason classification, and Switch to Manual tracking.

latestChanges.title: Dashboard Leaderboard
latestChanges.description: Removed Recent Signals section. Added Crowned Traders Leaderboard with period filtering (This Week, Last Week, This Month, Last Month) and aggregate performance stats grid.

latestChanges.title: Signal History Redesign
latestChanges.description: Rebuilt as card-based layout grouped by date with summary stats (Total Sent, Success, Failed), expandable raw payload viewer, copy and Discord preview actions.

latestChanges.title: Responsive Design Overhaul
latestChanges.description: Applied consistent responsive patterns across all pages: p-4 sm:p-6 padding, responsive text sizing, mobile-friendly tables with horizontal scroll, responsive dialogs, and mobile card views for complex data.

latestChanges.title: Unified Signal Submission
latestChanges.description: Built unified Send Signal form with crypto detection, LETF underlying map, live Discord preview, TradeSync integration, and chart analysis upload.
